title: GUI vs. CLI: Execution Bottlenecks in Screen-Only and Skill-Mediated Computer-Use Agents
innovation_summary: GUI vs CLI: Execution Bottlenecks in Screen-Only and Skill-Mediated Computer-Use Agents: We introduce a matched execution-layer benchmark of 440 desktop tasks across 18 applications and 12 workflow categories, where screen-only GUI agents and skill-mediated CLI agents receive.
